reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvM0xmMENnEAE

reviews.comment:
I couldn’t be happier with the tint job I got here. From start to finish, the experience was professional, fast, and top-quality. The team really knows their stuff—helped me choose the perfect tint for both style and heat reduction, and walked me through all the options without any pressure.

The shop was clean, the staff was super friendly, and they treated my car with care like it was their own. The install was flawless—no bubbles, no dust, no peeling edges. You can tell they take pride in their work.

It’s been a few weeks now and the tint still looks brand new. Makes my car look sleeker, cooler (literally), and more private. If you’re on the fence about where to go, this is the spot. Quality, value, and craftsmanship all in one. Highly recommend!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for your fantastic review and for taking the time to share your experience with us. We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying your window tint and appreciate your kind words about our team and services. It means so much to us that you had a positive experience and noticed the craftsmanship we strive for in each installation. If you ever need assistance in the future or have any questions, please feel free to reach out. We're here to help!

reviews.comment: The service and quality of work was PHENOMENAL!!! Every person I encountered was friendly, knowledgeable, and down to earth.  If I could rate this business 10 stars I would!!!  I will definitely recommend this business to anyone needing a QUALITY tint job.

reviews.comment:
I don't usually bother with reviews good or bad for much of anything, but the team at Frederick Window Tinting absolutely earned a glowing review and won my recommendation to anyone that needs their services.  It's rare to find a group like this that is hustling to help their customers, while having a completely jovial family like team environment.  Their work speaks for itself, and it doesn't stop there. If asked questions about other products they are happy to share projects with a sense of pride only arizans can do. I am absolutely looking forward to the next time I see these guys.

Thank you again to the whole team. You guys rock!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for your kind words and glowing review! It truly makes our day to hear that you had such a positive experience with our team. We pride ourselves on creating a welcoming and energetic environment for all of our customers, and we're thrilled to know that this stood out to you. Our team works hard to provide the best service possible, and it's rewarding to know that we've earned your recommendation. We're looking forward to your next visit and are always here to help with any questions or projects you might have. Thanks again for your support!

reviews.comment: Got my car tinted here and was absolutely pleased with the customer service, quality, and wait time. From start to finish, everything was smooth and hassle free. Sharyn made scheduling a breeze, helping me find the perfect time. When I arrived, Danny completed the tinting process in no time and with exceptional efficiency. The quality of the tint is outstanding, and I haven’t encouraged ANY issues since. The customer service was top-notch throughout the entire experience. Before you head out, check out Trinity’s small businesses like her sticker company! The cutest aesthetically pleasing car and stationery stickers for an affordable price. I highly recommend this place if you’re looking for professional, reasonably priced, high quality window tinting! Can’t wait to come back!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for your glowing review! We're delighted to hear that you had such a positive experience with our service and appreciated our team's effort to make everything smooth and efficient for you. It's fantastic to know that you love the quality of the tint and that it has been performing well without any issues. We also appreciate your shout-out to Trinity's small business – it's wonderful to see our local community being highlighted and supported. We look forward to welcoming you back whenever you need us. Thanks again for choosing us and recommending our services!

reviews.comment: I recently had my auto windows tinted by FWT.  From beginning to end, I had a great experience.  My appointment was scheduled by Sharon and she gave me exact pricing and fit me into their schedule because I was going to have to wait.  My appointment was on time. The shop was clean and the employee doing the job, Danny, was helpful and courteous. He explained everything and answered all questions. The pricing and the tint displays were clear and visible for all to see in the waiting area. Upon leaving, the instructions for how to properly cure the tint were explained by Sharon. Overall, I had a great experience with FWT and would highly recommend them to anyone interested in this type of service for your automobile. Support Frederick small business!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for sharing your experience with Frederick Window Tinting! We’re thrilled to hear that our team provided you with excellent service from start to finish. We're glad Sharon and Danny could assist you effectively and give you the information you needed. We appreciate your support for our small business and look forward to serving you again in the future. Thank you for the recommendation!
